title: physalis angulata var. pendula
intro: Physalis angulata var. pendula is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, also known as the "devil's claw" due to its spiny, claw-like fruit. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Physalis angulata var. pendula include its potential to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. Physalis angulata var. pendula can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
